creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
3 vulnerabilities (and one concerning Windows, but I'm not counting
it here) were fixed in wireshark 1.0.7: [1], [2].

Fix: Port was already updated, we're fine here.

The following VuXML entry should be evaluated and added:
How-To-Repeat: 
[1] http://www.wireshark.org/docs/relnotes/wireshark-1.0.7.html
[2] http://www.wireshark.org/security/wnpa-sec-2009-02.html
